description: 定时巡检 cron review/watch 任务，检测无效 token 消耗、重复失败和异常运行，主动告警并提供停止/清理方案 | Patrol and audit cron review/watch tasks for wasted token consumption, repeated failures, and anomalies. Provides alerting and stop/cleanup recommendations.

permissions: modify cron jobs.json (only with explicit confirmation)
